reviews.comment:
Muy triste por ser del ACA. Ni siquiera venden una batería para auto. Algo básico para el automotor deberían vender. Como agua destilada.

(Translated by Google)
Very sad, especially since I'm an ACA member. They don't even sell car batteries. Something as basic as distilled water is essential for cars.

reviews.comment:
La atención en la estación de servicio es buenísima, en la confitería te atienden de forma excelente, si sos socio del A.C.A no te cobran ni el agua caliente. Los baños limpios, luminosos, ordenados con jabón líquido para las manos, con papel y toallitas de papel. Y lo mejor el parque, asadores, mesas, bancos, pileta con agua para lavar los utensilios, juegos para los chicos, campo para jugar a la pelota, depósitos con bolsas para desechar cosas. Explendidos lugar, absolutamente recomendable. Desde ya felicitaciones al Club, al concesionario y a los empleados

(Translated by Google)
The service at the gas station is excellent, and the staff at the café are superb. If you're an ACA member, they don't even charge for hot water. The restrooms are clean, bright, and well-stocked with liquid hand soap, toilet paper, and paper towels. And the best part is the park: grills, tables, benches, a sink with water for washing utensils, a playground, a field for playing ball, and trash cans with bags for disposing of waste. A splendid place, absolutely recommended. Congratulations to the Club, the dealership, and the employees.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18262014614826625245/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBdGVMc3R3RRAB
